recommendations.title: Cube 2: Hypercube
recommendations.overview: Eight strangers awaken with no memory, in a puzzling cube-shaped room where the laws of physics do not always apply.

recommendations.title: Death's Roulette
recommendations.overview: Seven strangers wake up in a mansion in the middle of nowhere to discover they are part of a twisted game. They will have 60 minutes to choose one person to die; otherwise, all of them will be murdered. As the clock ticks down, the most lurid secrets

recommendations.title: Oxygen
recommendations.overview: A woman wakes in a cryogenic chamber with no recollection of how she got there, and must find a way out before running out of air.

recommendations.title: Project Ithaca
recommendations.overview: Five strangers awaken to find themselves trapped aboard an alien spaceship that seems to be harnessing their terror to power the ship. They begin to understand that these species have been abducting humans for decades and possibly centuries.

recommendations.title: Nine Dead
recommendations.overview: Communication is the key to the survival for nine strangers who have been kidnapped by a masked gunman and told that one of them will die every ten minutes until they discover how they are all connected. Who of the nine lives and who dies?

recommendations.title: Static
recommendations.overview: A couple facing marital problems after losing their child finds their life together further complicated by a mysterious visitor.

recommendations.title: Cube
recommendations.overview: A group of strangers find themselves trapped in a maze-like prison. It soon becomes clear that each of them possesses the peculiar skills necessary to escape, if they don't wind up dead first.

recommendations.title: Exam
recommendations.overview: Eight talented candidates have reached the final stage of selection to join the ranks of a mysterious and powerful corporation. Entering a windowless room, where an armed guard keeps watch, they are given 80 minutes to answer one simple question.

recommendations.title: Reeker
recommendations.overview: Strangers trapped at an eerie travel oasis in the desert must unravel the mystery behind their visions of dying people while they are preyed upon by a decaying creature.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.
